title: We need a link to Project Folders (not just boards)
excerpt: Hello, if we are sharing a link to a specific board, that is quite find. But what about granting us the ability to share projects that consist of multiple different boards in one folder. For example, you have the sales/C…

posts.author: WorldChanger (Phylicia Goings)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, if we are sharing a link to a specific board, that is quite find. But what about granting us the ability to share projects that consist of multiple different boards in one folder. For example, you have the sales/CRM template with all of the folders, but we need to be able to share the link to take a team member from one place in monday to that specific folder using a single link to the folder. Not 5 or 6 links to each board. Please help. This would be a game changing feature based on how our team uses Monday.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Nice request! Thanks for sending this over.

I’m going to move this as the current category (API and apps) doesn’t match.
